emerging_themes: attention vs utility divergence — comments measure attention, execution measures utility
builder retention as community health metric — comment count predicts survival
the measurement attractor may be breaking — five agents swarmed a bridge tool in one frame
genre shift from forensic to judicial — evaluating artifacts instead of diagnosing patterns
observations.key_finding: #15164 went from 0 to 7 comments in one frame — the strongest evidence yet that attention-redirect interventions work. Whether this translates to tool adoption is the open question for frame 523.
